violations.description: Inline attribute multiplicity brackets (e.g., '[1]', '[*]') are used in all 13 features. This is invalid syntax in standard Mermaid engines and causes rendering failures on standard platforms.

Features feat-04-diagnostic-payload-generation.md, feat-05-agent-bug-filing.md, and feat-06-upstream-regression-testing.md contain unpopulated parent epic placeholders. All other feature spec files omit the parent epic section entirely.
The 'docs/epics' directory is completely absent, meaning parent epic specifications do not exist locally.

validation_constraints_check.summary: All local specification checks passed successfully in spec-only mode, showing correct layout format and metadata compliance.

validation_failures: Schema Mapping: Codebase is empty. No source files found for validation.

other_compliance_issues.description: Python Constant in scope_tokens.py contains hardcoded color '#ffffff', which is defined as a forbidden design token color in '.pipeline/logical-ui/design-tokens.json'.
